Slug.description: Lowercase kebab slug (RFC-007 identity), e.g. gh-a, bench-a. The same slug keys MQTT topics, controller REST paths, and DB rows — no translation layer.

Metric.description: Closed set of measured/derived quantities (RFC-007). Greenhouse-scoped metrics (temperature °C, humidity %RH, co2 ppm, par µmol·m⁻²·s⁻¹, vpd kPa) carry zone_id null; soil_moisture (VWC, 0–1) is zone-scoped. Kept as a local copy rather than a cross-contract $ref, matching this repo's self-contained-contract convention.

ActuatorName.description: Closed set of actuators (physical-system-single.md §Outputs); the same names the MQTT, platform-controller-control-rest, and platform-dashboard-rest contracts use. Kept as a local copy rather than a cross-contract $ref, matching this repo's self-contained-contract convention.

error.description: Human-readable description of what went wrong.

ValidationError.description: A rejected request, naming the field and the bound it violated — the same shape the controller REST, platform-dashboard-rest, and optimizer-platform-setpoints-rest contracts return. Here it is returned when a query parameter is out of range (e.g. an unknown window or interval).
